name: teams-domain-store
description: Create teams-multi-tenancy domain store with domain() API in packages/state-api/src/teams/
acceptanceCriteria: domain.ts exports TeamsMultiTenancyDomain ArkType scope with User, Tenant, TenantMember, BillingAccount, Workspace entities
All identifier fields use 'string' type with x-mst-type: identifier pattern
Entity references use entity name directly (e.g., tenant_id: 'Tenant')
domain.ts exports const teamsMultiTenancyDomain = domain({ name: 'teams-multi-tenancy', from: TeamsMultiTenancyDomain, enhancements })
domain.name MUST match schema name exactly: 'teams-multi-tenancy'
enhancements.collections adds findByTenant methods for TenantMember and Workspace collections
Snake_case field names: user_id, tenant_id, billing_account_id, sso_settings, stripe_customer_id, tax_id, credits_balance
Role enum includes: admin, billing_admin, editor, member
